page_content: LING888 Doctoral Research Paper (1-6 Credits) Students will strengthen their abilities to formulate coherent research questions, conduct research and create a publishable piece of work. In addition, the course is part of a set of requirements to advance to doctoral candidacy. Repeatable to: 6 credits. Credit Only Granted for: LING888 or LING895. Formerly: LING895.
